extract: Slowpoke (Japanese: ヤドン Yadon) is a dual-type Water/Psychic Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves into Slowbro starting at level 37 or Slowking when traded while holding a King's Rock. In Galar, Slowpoke has a pure Psychic-type regional form, introduced in Pokémon Sword and Shield's 1.1.0 patch. It evolves into Galarian Slowbro when exposed to a Galarica Cuff or Galarian Slowking when exposed to a Galarica Wreath. These Slowpoke can also be found in Blueberry Academy's Terarium. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.) Slowpoke and its evolved forms are associated with Shellder.
